title: Visibility is no longer the finish line: why dock and yard execution now depends on integration
summary:
Supply chain operators have spent years investing in better visibility. For many, the result is a clearer view of inbound loads, outbound shipments, yard activity and carrier performance.

title: Handler AGI claims union’s ‘misleading’ campaign cost it $20m in airline contracts
summary:
US handler Alliance Ground International (AGI) has accused the Service Employees International Union (SEIU) of orchestrating a campaign of “false and misleading” allegations that led to the loss of almost $20m in airline contracts.
AGI has also filed an injunction to halt the campaign. 
The handler alleges SEIU and its Local 32BJ deliberately targeted its airline customers, government agencies, and other stakeholders in an effort to pressure it into recognising the ...
